name: agent-bridge
description: Bidirectional agent bridge as an MCP server: exposes `antigravity_agent` (spawn an Antigravity agent — Gemini models — via the `agy` CLI), `claude_agent` (spawn a Claude agent via the `claude` CLI), and `codex_agent` (spawn an OpenAI Codex agent via the `codex` CLI), plus skills for tiered task delegation (heavy model plans, fast model implements) and for running cross-model code reviews.
